expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task status tracking with update controls and filtering.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status persistence with pending default",
      "description": "As a product owner, I want each task to store a status defaulting to pending so that existing and new tasks have a consistent lifecycle state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Tasks table has status column with allowed values pending, in_progress, and done",
        "Existing task records backfill to pending",
        "New tasks default to pending when status is omitted",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/20260618_add_task_status.sql",
        "src/server/tasks/task.repository.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Define shared task status type for server and UI",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a shared TaskStatus type so that status handling remains consistent across API responses and UI components.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Shared TaskStatus type is exported with values pending, in_progress, and done",
        "Task DTO and API schema use shared TaskStatus type",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/shared/tasks/task-status.ts",
        "src/shared/tasks/task.types.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend action to update task status",
      "description": "As a user, I want task status updates to be saved from task list interactions so that task progress persists across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Server exposes task status update action or endpoint accepting pending, in_progress, and done",
        "Invalid status values are rejected with validation error",
        "Successful updates persist in database and return updated task payload",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/tasks/task.service.ts",
        "src/server/tasks/task.routes.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show task status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task card to show current status badge so that I can quickly scan work state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards render status badge for pending, in_progress, and done",
        "Badge label updates after saved status changes",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/task-card.tsx",
        "src/ui/tasks/task-status-badge.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add status control on task list rows",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change task status directly from task list rows so that updating progress is fast.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each task row includes status dropdown with pending, in_progress, and done options",
        "Changing selection triggers backend status update and keeps row in sync with server response",
        "Update errors show inline feedback without page reload",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/task-list-row.tsx",
        "src/ui/tasks/use-update-task-status.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Filter task list by status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter task list by status so that I can focus on pending, in-progress, or completed work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list includes status filter options All, Pending, In Progress, and Done",
        "Selecting filter shows only matching tasks while preserving task ordering rules",
        "Filter state can be reset to All",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/task-list-filters.tsx",
        "src/ui/tasks/task-list.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.
